info.description: Quay registry API implemented in Go
info.title: Quay Go API

get.description: List messages displayed on the quay web app for all user
get.summary: List messages displayed on the quay web app for all user

parameters.description: Filter message by severity (comma separated, accepted values: info, warning, error)
parameters.name: severity

post.description: Create a new message to displayed on the quay web app for all user
post.summary: Create a new message to displayed on the quay web app for all user

parameters.description: UUID of the message to update
parameters.name: uuid

patch.description: Update the content or the severity of an existing message displayed on the quay web app for all user
patch.summary: Update the content or the severity of an existing message displayed on the quay web app for all user

parameters.description: UUID of the message to update
parameters.name: uuid

parameters.description: Filter organizations by public or private (true/false)
parameters.name: is_public

get.description: List organization's teams with optional filtering

post.description: Create a team inside the organization
post.summary: Create a team inside the organization

parameters.description: Name of the team to delete
parameters.name: teamname

parameters.description: Team description and role to update
parameters.name: update

parameters.description: Filter team members on invited status
parameters.name: is_invited

put.description: Add a user to a team
put.summary: Add a user to a team

delete.description: Remove a user from a team
delete.summary: Remove a user from a team

parameters.description: Organization or Username as namespace to filter repositories
parameters.name: namespace

parameters.description: Repository name in the format namespace/repository
parameters.name: repository

parameters.description: Include tags in the repository response
parameters.name: include_tags

parameters.description: Include statistics in the repository response
parameters.name: include_stats

get.description: List teams permission on a repository
get.summary: List teams permission on a repository

parameters.description: Repository name in the format namespace/repository
parameters.name: repository

get.summary: Get a team's permission on a repository

parameters.description: Repository name in the format namespace/repository
parameters.name: repository

parameters.description: Repository name in the format namespace/repository
parameters.name: repository

get.description: List users permission on a repository
get.summary: List users permission on a repository

parameters.description: Repository name in the format namespace/repository
parameters.name: repository

get.description: Get a user's permission on a repository
get.summary: Get a user's permission on a repository

parameters.description: Repository name in the format namespace/repository

parameters.name: repository

get.description: Get the current authenticated user information
get.summary: Get the current authenticated user information

parameters.description: Username/Org name/Team name to get avatar for
parameters.name: name

namespace.description: Can be null if is a global repo, not organization scoped

description.description: Description of the Team can be in Markdown format (optional)

role.description: Name of the role ('admin', 'creator' or 'member'. Optional. Default 'member')

code.description: Code is a sting that represents the error code (e.g. "USER_NOT_FOUND", "INVALID_INPUT", etc.)

ApiKeyAuth.description: API key authentication using the Authorization header. The value should be in the format "Bearer {token}"
ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
